case_title: THE 9TH STREET DESIGN CENTER, LP VS. MUTUAL EXPRESS COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE 9TH STREET DESIGN CENTER, LP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY THE 9TH STREET DESIGN CENTER, LP AS TO DEFENDANT MUTUAL EXPRESS COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-29-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-17-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
